docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED MAR-24-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIASTONE, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS $1,732.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,827.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIASTONE, INC
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY EKMEKJIAN, GAREN ( RITZ JEWLERS) HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DIASTONE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIASTONE, INC
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-26-2015 - FEE FOR SERVICE $46.00 - AS TO THIRD PARTY EKMEKJIAN, GAREN ( RITZ JEWLERS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIASTONE, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF DIASTONE, INC. RE: ADDING THIRD PARTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIASTONE, INC

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2016 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-04-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHAMI SHAH--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANTS RITZ JEWELERS AND GAREN EKMEKJIAN. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-03-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $500 TO $1000 PER WEEK FOR 4 MONTHS, TO THE PLAINTIFF. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHAMI SHAH--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GAREN EKMEKJIAN--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHAMI SHAH--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
